guidelines: Headlines (H1/H2) MUST use Noto Serif, tightly tracked (tracking-tight), never default to bold; use light or medium weights to convey luxury.
Body and UI text MUST use Montserrat, tracking-wide for overlines/labels (tracking-[0.2em] uppercase).
H1 should scale fluidly but not exceed text-6xl. H2 around text-4xl.

split_screen_architecture.desktop: 100vw, divided exactly 50/50. Left: Main content/Dashboard. Right: AI Advisory Chat.
split_screen_architecture.mobile: Stacks vertically. Content on top, AI Chat togglable or floating above.
split_screen_architecture.implementation: Use grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 h-screen overflow-hidden. Left panel scrolls independently. Right panel acts as fixed/sticky chat interface.

layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous spacing. p-8 or p-12 inside containers. Use p-6 inside cards. Use gap-8 or gap-12 for grid layouts.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat background (bg-[#112A42] or bg-transparent), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no heavy shadow. On hover, slight lift and border color shifts to gold/30.
surfaces_and_components.glassmorphism: Used for floating AI inputs or sticky navs. bg-[#0B1C2C]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-t or border-b border-white/10.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#C8A96A] text-[#0B1C2C] hover:bg-[#DCC48F] font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all. Secondary: border border-[#C8A96A] text-[#C8A96A] hover:bg-[#C8A96A]/10.
surfaces_and_components.ai_chat: Persistent in the right 50% pane. Floating input field with glassmorphism at the bottom. Messages use distinct backgrounds (User: bg-[#C8A96A] text-[#0B1C2C], AI: transparent with white text and gold border left).
surfaces_and_components.shadcn: Heavily customize Shadcn components to strip the 'Vercel-look'. Overwrite rounded-md to rounded-sm (very sharp edges fit luxury consulting). Remove default gray rings, use gold focus rings.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle border color shifts, opacity changes. No heavy scaling.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use ASCII or minimal gold spinners. Avoid standard blue spinning circles.

icons.style: Light weight, stroke-width 1.5, matching text color or gold accent.

hero_background.description: Black and gold diagonal abstract texture. Good for right panel or subtle overlay.

corporate_architecture.description: Modern skyscraper reflecting premium corporate aesthetic.

consultant_working.description: Ornate wooden office representing high-end consulting strategy.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install custom fonts: Noto Serif and Montserrat from Google Fonts via tailwind/CSS imports.
Implement the 50/50 split screen layout strictly: w-full flex flex-col lg:grid lg:grid-cols-2. Both sides must be scrollable independently on desktop.
Customize tailwind.config.js to include conssor colors (conssor-navy: '#0B1C2C', conssor-gold: '#C8A96A', etc).
MANDATORY: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, links, and chat elements in kebab-case, role-based format.
For the AI Chat on the right pane: Make the input field sticky at the bottom with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B1C2C]/80).
Never use full-screen bright gradients. Use the abstract dark/gold texture image sparingly or pure CSS radial noise.
Override Shadcn components: reduce border-radius to rounded-sm or rounded-none to reflect high-end luxury, and change focus rings to gold.
